title: Vance's stark warning to Israeli leaders: 'Donald J. Trump is the only head of state in the entire world who is sympathetic to the nation of Israel'
subhed: By sharply criticizing Israel, accusing it of blocking the agreement signed between Washington and Tehran on June 17, the US vice president exposed a lasting rift between the two countries.

title: 'In France, 50% of buildings are not adapted to heatwaves'
After death of 11-year-old Lyhanna, French public invited to courthouse voice anger at justice system
Ukrainian defense manufacturers seek their footing as headliners at Eurosatory arms fair in Paris
subhed: Promoted for their 'battle-tested' weapons – a coveted label in the defense industry – Ukrainian arms manufacturers are encountering a European market that remains hesitant amid regulations that are ill-suited to their urgent needs.

title: Labour's Andy Burnham, Keir Starmer's rival, wins by-election and secures Parliament seat
subhed: The mayor of Greater Manchester won by a wide margin over the far-right Reform UK candidate in the Makerfield constituency. He now aims to become the leader of the Labour Party and unseat the prime minister.

title: Wealthy taxpayers clean out their holdings, keeping their homes, sports cars and gold bars safe
subhed: The new 20% tax on 'luxury' assets held in personal holdings is prompting owners to quickly remove them. As a result, the measure risks bringing in almost nothing.

title: 'The French are reading less and the consequence is that many bookshops now face extinction'
subhed: In 2025, for the first time, more bookshops closed in France than opened. These businesses, which receive less public support than broadcasting, cinema, the press or the music industry, need greater backing, writes culture columnist Michel Guerrin.

In Trump's polarized America, empathy faces unanimous opposition
subhed: Once valued in American public life, empathy now faces criticism from the far right, which sees it as a sign of weakness. The left, too, is questioning its relevance: In a world where brutality prevails, can we still afford to show understanding?

title: French security replaces Palantir with domestic firm ChapsVision, a complicated choice
subhed: Used since the 2015 terrorist attacks, the controversial American company's data analysis software is set to be gradually replaced by that of a French provider. The long-awaited decision presents a significant technological challenge.

title: Ending the war with Iran comes at the cost of major US concessions
subhed: The memorandum of understanding, signed on the evening of June 17 by the presidents of both countries is intended to end hostilities and allow for the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. Nuclear negotiations will begin immediately afterward.
